[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:

They wear a dark cap and a light gray or white garment that has a darker strap or trim visible near the shoulder.

Setting:
The background appears indoors, with a blue-and-gray surface or fabric behind the person and a large orange shape to the right side of the image. The lighting is soft and even, with no clear sunlight or weather visible.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is close and front-facing, with the subject filling most of the frame. The image is noticeably soft-focused, with mild blur around the face and background. Colors include skin tones, a dark cap, light clothing, blue-gray background elements, and a bright orange area on the right.

No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up portrait of a person wearing a dark cap and a light top. The background is out of focus, featuring blue-gray tones and a prominent orange area on the right.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
